technical_explanation: Bandwidth Saturation / Traffic Overload. High bandwidth utilization (90.0%) is causing link congestion, queue delays, and minor packet loss. Latency is also spiking due to queuing delay. The current telemetry profile indicates a deviation from expected network health.
business_impact: High bandwidth utilization (90.0%) is causing link congestion, queue delays, and minor packet loss. Latency is also spiking due to queuing delay.
recommended_resolution: Inspect traffic policies, throttle non-critical bulk flows, and consider applying QoS to prevent saturation.
cisco_cli:
show policy-map interface
show queueing interface
show processes cpu
verification_steps: Confirm alert details, verify the affected circuit and device status, then validate the fix by comparing new telemetry to baseline thresholds.
preventive_recommendations: Document the incident, tune traffic engineering policies, and schedule a maintenance window to validate WAN stability.

rca.impact: High bandwidth utilization (90.0%) is causing link congestion, queue delays, and minor packet loss. Latency is also spiking due to queuing delay.
